form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (23.95) when third at Horsham in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 10 starts. Leading player.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 390m at Ballarat behind Sumo Smash beaten 12 lengths (23.16). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.75 lengths at this track over 425m (24.22) beating Notorious Blaze in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 15. Can make it two on the bounce.
